violations.description: Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Consumer self-service sign was not posted where needed or as required. Observed on the buffet lines there as no sign stating new plate is needed each time.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. There was nothing date marked in the kitchen in the coolers. such as cut up vegetables, to cut up chicken, beef.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Observed equipment that needs to be cleaned more frequently. Such as mixer.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Observed the floor under the hood system very dirty at time of inspection.
